summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Mechanic Mobile App API endpoints. All 8 core features tested and working correctly: OTP Login, OTP Verification, Inspections List, Inspection Detail, Questionnaire, Accept Inspection, Save Progress, Complete Inspection, and Reject Inspection.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests - minor inconsistency but functionally correct

critical_code_review_comments: OTP store is in-memory (mechanic_otp_store dict) - should use Redis in production for scalability
Dev mode OTP (123456) is enabled by default via MECHANIC_APP_DEV_MODE env var - ensure this is disabled in production

success_rate.backend: 100% (12 passed, 4 skipped due to no test data)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing mechanic and inspection data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mechanic app APIs fully tested. All endpoints working: /api/auth/request-otp, /api/auth/verify-otp, /api/mechanic/inspections, /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}, /api/inspections/{id}/questionnaire, /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}/accept, /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}/reject, /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}/progress, /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}/complete. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_mechanic_app_api.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.POST /api/auth/request-otp: PASS - Returns success for registered mechanic, 404 for unregistered
features_tested.POST /api/auth/verify-otp: PASS - Returns token and mechanicProfile on valid OTP, 400 on invalid
features_tested.GET /api/mechanic/inspections: PASS - Returns list of inspections with proper filtering by status/city/date
features_tested.GET /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}: PASS - Returns inspection detail, 404 for non-existent
features_tested.GET /api/inspections/{id}/questionnaire: PASS - Returns client-specific questions from inspection template
features_tested.POST /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}/acce: PASS - Assigns mechanic and updates status to ACCEPTED
features_tested.POST /api/mechanic/inspections/{id}/reje: PASS - Unassigns mechanic and updates status to REJECTED with reason

api_response_validation.inspections_list_response: Array of inspection objects with id, scheduledAt, status, vehicleNumber, makeModelVariant, city, customerName, customerPhone, customerAddress, assignedMechanicId, requiredModules, progress, orderId, packageName
api_response_validation.questionnaire_response: Object with inspection_id, inspection_template_id, inspection_template_name, report_style, partner_id, partner_name, questions array, total_questions
